_note: v2: game-first anchoring + game_reference rubric (see build_guide.v2 note).
template: {game} video game key art: {subject} from {game} in a recognizable {game} environment, signature {game} visual style, dark fantasy backdrop, glowing skill icons arranged along the right side as rank bars, S A B tier framing, {palette} palette, {lighting}, dramatic depth, empty upper-left zone for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, generic fantasy setting, unrelated game

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
